title: Maple Leaf Pro Wrestling joins MyAEW
summary: Maple Leaf Pro Wrestling joins MyAEW
imageAlt: Maple Leaf Pro Wrestling joins MyAEW
aiSummary: Maple Leaf Pro Wrestling joins MyAEW
keyPoints: Maple Leaf Pro Wrestling joins MyAEW
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.
fullArticle:
All Elite Wrestling’s MyAEW streaming platform has gotten one of its biggest additions yet.

It was announced today that Scott D’Amore’s Maple Leaf Pro Wrestling has joined MyAEW and will be airing weekly episodes of its Mayhem series for free on the service. Those episodes will be available on MyAEW in the United States and more than 100 countries globally. In Canada, Maple Leaf Pro has an exclusive TV deal with TSN.

This announcement comes in advance of Mayhem debuting on TSN2 at midnight Eastern/9 p.m. Pacific next Wednesday (July 15). Episodes will be added to MyAEW every Thursday starting on July 16. The first season of Mayhem will consist of 12 episodes, with Stu Grayson, Gisele Shaw, Johnny TV, Rhino, and Billy Gunn among the talent set to be featured.
